posts.text: Promoters have continued to buy from the market since the day the results were published. image 1230×429 29.7 KB Good to see that the industrial chemicals division have started production with weak nitric acid. Ammonium Nitrate solution and HDAN will follow. The company expects a 75 to 80 % capacity utilization for the new facility. image 886×193 24.2 KB Working capital requirements should increase due to higher gas prices. image 706×136 14.7 KB image 723×187 23.9 KB There may be some temporary cash mismatches due to a sudden increase in gas prices. image 898×241 14.4 KB The company is also wa…

posts.text: image 732×259 18.3 KB Good results; both promoters & DIIs are increasing stake (ICICI Prudential is buying it on dips); however, the 8-year period for the applicability of NIP-2012 for G-3 is expiring in December 2026, the market might be waiting for its outcome
